description: Inline modifier that sets the stroke color of a shape. Accepts CSS color names (unquoted) or hex color strings (quoted).
utility: Set stroke/outline color on shapes using inline modifier

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Color name (unquoted) or hex string (quoted) - e.g., red, blue, "#ff0000"

alternates.description: Set color using a standard color name
Set color using a hex color code
Color applied as inline modifier to a shape
Color applied to a plot curve
Color applied to math text rendering

examples.scenario: Colored triangle with no stroke opacity

examples.expression: t = table(at(1,7), "x", eq, slopeeq, range(2, 1.5, 1.1, 1.01, 1.001), c(blue))
